variants.title: Fleetguard AF424 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the Donaldson X770136
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF424 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.

variants.title: Donaldson X770136 Air Element Kit
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X770136 Air Element Kit is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
